title: Solitary Confinement and Human Rights: A Healthcare Provider Handout
author: Bodkin, Claire
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This handout summarizes content from a toolkit that offers practice guidance for learners, family physicians, and other healthcare providers who serve incarcerated individuals who are in isolation or solitary confinement.
steps_raw: This handout summarizes content from a toolkit that offers practice guidance for learners, family physicians, and other healthcare providers who serve incarcerated individuals who are in isolation or solitary confinement.
